products.title:
XL Silver Dollar  (MIX OF SPECIES)
*Read description*
products.body_html:
Myloplus rubripinnis/ Myloplus schomburgkii  Mixed in
size 8"-9"

Customer turn in for a big group of silver dollars all around 8-9"TL. As overnight shipping for this size can be tricky i will make mention Southwest cargo is BEST option and worth the drive for you and me. Both for safety and price.
**** there may be an adjustment in shipping cost after purchase. This means you may receive a bill for extra as we may not be able to fit the right amount of fish per box if overnight is chose. Please call during the times of 11am CST Ato 7pm CST with questions. 708-420-0145

products.title:
Blue Eyed Pleco (Panaque cochliodon)
panaque suttoni XL
products.body_html:
Size 9”-11”

RECOMMENDED SOUTHWEST CARGO SHIPPING ONLY

ANY QUESTION REGARDING SHIPPING PLEASE GIVE US A CALL AT 708-420-0145

** this is not a real Suttoni and none ever enter the hobby. The area those are collected are far from exporters and haven't been seen in likely 20-30+ years. We are just adding this name so it is more visible online and to show you the fish your looking for better.***
